What We Do

Our Services

01 🏗️

Driveways

Plain, coloured, or exposed aggregate — precision poured and finished to handle Gippsland conditions for decades.

02 🏠

House Slabs

Reinforced, properly prepared slabs for new builds, extensions, garages and sheds. Built right from the ground up.

03 ✨

Exposed Aggregate

Natural stone decorative finishes with real grip and serious kerb appeal. Premium look, built to last.

04 🌿

Paths & Patios

Level, clean footpaths and outdoor entertaining areas. No cracking, no settling, no excuses.

05 🧱

Retaining Walls

Concrete and stone retaining walls engineered for erosion control and landscaping that holds its ground.

06 🔧

Cutting & Drilling

Precision concrete cutting, core drilling, grinding and removal. Professional equipment, clean site every time.

Why Choose BCC

Solid
Work.

Ben Clarke Concreting has been laying exceptional concrete across Warragul and Gippsland for over 15 years. Every job — backyard path or full commercial pour — gets the same relentless detail.

No shortcuts. No cutting corners. No mystery costs. Just concrete done properly.

Licensed & Fully Insured

Qualified, covered on every single job — total peace of mind.

On Time, Every Time

We respect your schedule and coordinate pour day like clockwork.

Free Detailed Quotes

Transparent, itemised — zero hidden costs before a single shovel moves.

Residential & Commercial

Backyards to building sites — we handle every scale with the same standard.

Workmanship Guarantee

If it's not right, we make it right. Full stop. No argument.

How It Works

The BCC Process

01

Contact

Call or message Ben for a no-obligation chat about your job.

02

Site Visit

We come to you — assess, measure, and give a detailed written quote.

03

Preparation

Sub-base, formwork, steel — the foundation every lasting slab needs.

04

The Pour

Professional placement, compaction, and finishing by our experienced crew.

05

Handover

Full clean-up and walkthrough — job not done until you're satisfied.
